title: Playground Data Workbench
concept: A responsive tabbed operations workspace that leads with Site Manager files, Blueprint JSON, database tools, and logs while keeping the live WordPress shell protected beside it.
flows: Save a temporary Playground to a local directory with folder picker state, permission grant, copy progress, selected folder identity, local storage badge, saved row mutation, and reload consequence
Edit and save a selected WordPress file with dirty state, save result, activity history, and WordPress log mutation
Download the SQLite-backed database and open Adminer or phpMyAdmin with progress and resulting activity records
Validate, copy, download, and run Blueprint JSON while browsing an honestly labeled representative subset of the 43-blueprint gallery
Import a zip with archive validation, replacement confirmation, progress, final preview/path mutation, temporary storage state, and logs
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with open, manage, rename, delete confirmation, final row removal, and active-site fallback
featureCoverage: GitHub import with account connection and token caveat
Import zip trigger and replacement confirmation
Blueprint gallery categories and search with representative subset label
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, selected editor, dirty state, and save result
Blueprint editor with validate, copy, download, run, and result state
Database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Database download and Blueprint bundle portability
